items.title: SingGuard: A Policy-Adaptive Multimodal LLM Guardrail with Dynamic Reasoning

items.title: ABACUS: Adapting Unified Foundation Model for Bridging Image Count Understanding and Generation
items.abstract: ABACUS is a unified vision-language model that handles object counting, crowd counting, referring-expression counting, and count-faithful image generation without any benchmark-specific training requi
